calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2017 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Upsolar America, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Giselle Casey #8098.
David niegowski, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Upsolar America, Inc.
Plaintiff's witness Stephane Dufrenne was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Able energy Co. as follows:
Damages/Principal - $87,300.00
Prejudgment Interest - $4,631.09
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs - $920.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $62,851.09.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Continued To Oct-04-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
